author: y4rr
content: Decision: Use ferrotorch-llama's existing tiny_config pattern (from model.rs unit tests) as the basis for the synthetic reference model. The config used: vocab=64, hidden=32, intermediate=64, layers=2, heads=4, kv_heads=2 (GQA group=2), rope_theta=10000, rms_eps=1e-5. This is tiny enough to run in Python in <1s, large enough to exercise GQA (num_heads != num_kv_heads). Seed=42 for reproducibility. All weights generated with torch.manual_seed(42) + torch.randn(...) rescaled to prevent overflow in attention.
